title: Digiplot – automatically extract data from chart images with AI
abstract: Digiplot is here to save the day when you're drowning in complex charts! Imagine having a magic broom that can effortlessly extract data from any image. Say goodbye to tedious manual data entry and hello to hassle-free insights with Digiplot. Give it a try and let this AI tool do the heavy lifting for you!
abstract_zh: Digiplot，你是不是也遇到过这样的情况：一堆复杂的图表让你眼花缭乱？别担心，Digiplot来了！它就像一个神奇的扫帚，轻轻一挥，就把数据从图里扫出来了。再也不用费劲儿地盯着屏幕抠数字了，轻松获得你想要的数据。赶紧试试吧，让Digiplot帮你搞定一切！
